channel.title: Baidu, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Baidu, Inc. (baidu).

item.title: CVE-2023-52314 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Command injection in convert_shape_compare
item.description: PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0 has a command injection in convert_shape_compare. This resulted in the ability to execute arbitrary commands on the operating system.

item.title: CVE-2023-52313 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ — FPE in paddle.argmin and paddle.argmax
item.description: FPE in paddle.argmin and paddle.argmax in PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0. This flaw can cause a runtime crash and a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2023-52312 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Null pointer dereference in paddle.crop
item.description: Nullptr dereference in paddle.crop in PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0. This flaw can cause a runtime crash and a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2023-52311 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Command injection in _wget_download
item.description: PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0 has a command injection in _wget_download. This resulted in the ability to execute arbitrary commands on the operating system.

item.title: CVE-2023-52310 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Command injection in get_online_pass_interval
item.description: PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0 has a command injection in get_online_pass_interval. This resulted in the ability to execute arbitrary commands on the operating system.

item.title: CVE-2023-52309 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Heap buffer overflow in paddle.repeat_interleave
item.description: Heap buffer overflow in paddle.repeat_interleave in PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0. This flaw can lead to a denial of service, information disclosure, or more damage is possible.

item.title: CVE-2023-52308 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ — FPE in paddle.amin
item.description: FPE in paddle.amin in PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0. This flaw can cause a runtime crash and a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2023-52307 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Stack overflow in paddle.linalg.lu_unpack
item.description: Stack overflow in paddle.linalg.lu_unpack in PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0. This flaw can lead to a denial of service, or even more damage.

item.title: CVE-2023-52306 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ — FPE in paddle.lerp
item.description: FPE in paddle.lerp in PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0. This flaw can cause a runtime crash and a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2023-52305 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ — FPE in paddle.topk
item.description: FPE in paddle.topk in PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0. This flaw can cause a runtime crash and a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2023-52304 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Stack overflow in paddle.searchsorted
item.description: Stack overflow in paddle.searchsorted in PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0. This flaw can lead to a denial of service, or even more damage.

item.title: CVE-2023-52303 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Segfault in paddle.put_along_axis
item.description: Nullptr in paddle.put_along_axis in PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0. This flaw can cause a runtime crash and a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2023-52302 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Segfault in paddle.nextafter
item.description: Nullptr in paddle.nextafter in PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0. This flaw can cause a runtime crash and a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2023-38678 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Segfault in paddle.mode
item.description: OOB access in paddle.mode in PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0. This flaw can cause a runtime crash and a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2023-38677 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ — FPE in paddle.linalg.eig
item.description: FPE in paddle.linalg.eig in PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0. This flaw can cause a runtime crash and a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2023-38676 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Segfault in paddle.dot
item.description: Nullptr in paddle.dot in PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0. This flaw can cause a runtime crash and a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2023-38675 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ — FPE in paddle.linalg.matrix_rank
item.description: FPE in paddle.linalg.matrix_rank in PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0. This flaw can cause a runtime crash and a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2023-38674 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ — FPE in paddle.nanmedian
item.description: FPE in paddle.nanmedian in PaddlePaddle before 2.6.0. This flaw can cause a runtime crash and a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2023-38673 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Command injection in fs.py
item.description: PaddlePaddle before 2.5.0 has a command injection in fs.py. This resulted in the ability to execute arbitrary commands on the operating system.

item.title: CVE-2023-38672 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ — FPE in paddle.linalg.matrix_power
item.description: FPE in paddle.trace in PaddlePaddle before 2.5.0. This flaw can cause a runtime crash and a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2023-38671 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Heap buffer overflow in paddle.trace
item.description: Heap buffer overflow in paddle.trace in PaddlePaddle before 2.5.0. This flaw can lead to a denial of service, information disclosure, or more damage is possible.

item.title: CVE-2023-38670 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Null pointer dereference in paddle.flip
item.description: Null pointer dereference in paddle.flip in PaddlePaddle before 2.5.0. This resulted in a runtime crash and denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2023-38669 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in paddle.diagonal in PaddlePaddle before 2.5.0. This resulted in a potentially exploitable condition.

item.title: CVE-2022-46742 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Code injection in paddle.audio.functional.get_window in PaddlePaddle 2.4.0-rc0 allows arbitrary code execution.

item.title: CVE-2022-46741 · 7.1 HIGH
item.description: Out-of-bounds read in gather_tree in PaddlePaddle before 2.4.
